itemListElement.reviewBody: Choosing GIIS has been one of the best decisions for our child. The school provides a strong foundation through engaging teaching methods and a caring environment.

itemReviewed.name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Hadapsar - Malwadi,Hadapsar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Global Indian International School (GIIS) in Hadapsar, Pune is an exceptional institution that provides a world-class education. The school's state-of-the-art facilities, experienced teachers, and innovative curriculum create a supportive and inclusive learning environment. My daughter has thrived here, developing academically, creatively, and socially. The school's emphasis on extracurricular activities, sports, and character development is impressive. The staff is dedicated, and the community is warm and welcoming. We're grateful to be part of the GIIS family and highly recommend it to anyone seeking a well-rounded education for their child.

itemReviewed.name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Hadapsar - Malwadi,Hadapsar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
As a parent of two children at this school, I am thrilled with the exceptional education and supportive environment provided. The teachers are knowledgeable and deeply invested in each child's development, creating an engaging and positive atmosphere that my children love.

The school's innovative approach to learning has ignited my elder son's passion for science and technology, while my younger daughter thrives in an environment prioritizing both academic and personal growth.

The robust sports and extracurricular programs teach valuable lessons in teamwork and sportsmanship. Family-involved events, such as the father’s football match, mother’s cricket match, Dandiya night, and more, strengthen community bonds.

We are extremely happy with our decision to enroll our children here and highly recommend this school for outstanding education and a nurturing environment.

itemReviewed.name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Hadapsar - Malwadi,Hadapsar

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am yudith from grade 6c i just love the energy for sports here

itemReviewed.name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Hadapsar - Malwadi,Hadapsar

itemListElement.reviewBody: After shelling out lakhs in fees, our children spend almost eight hours at school daily. Yet, they're pressured to continue studying at home with constant homework and a relentless focus on grades. This feels like a betrayal of the school's initial promise of a unique learning methodology. If we're expected to be primary educators anyway, then homeschooling seems like a more viable option. Why waste money and time on a system that doesn't deliver on its promises? this is my first and last at GIIS | NOT RECOMMENDED AT ALL

itemReviewed.name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Hadapsar - Malwadi,Hadapsar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Waste of time sending your child to this school! They overload students with project work and then blame the kids and parents for not handling the pressure. GIIS Singapore and Subaru schools are top-notch, but Pine Campus is a complete waste! honest review.

itemReviewed.name: Global Indian International School (GIIS) Hadapsar - Malwadi,Hadapsar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
My son is in 10th grade at GIIS-Pune.
To save his crucial time for studies we have opted for transport facilities provided by the school.
The school bus is always on time and picks up and drops our child at our door.
